sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62384" key="*lecifa/nhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Λεξῐφάνης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n62384.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Phrase-monger</tr_>, title of dialogue by Lucian.</sense> </entryFree>
